common.access_dashboard: Access the tactical dashboard and live response tools.
common.join_network: Join the local emergency synchronization network.
common.need_account: Need a new account? Sign Up
common.have_account: Already have an account? Log In
common.disclaimer: CrisisSync uses situational data shared during active response protocols. By signing in, you agree to local data sync.

emergency.responders_notified: Responders have been notified of your location. Tap once to cancel the alert if you are safe.

permissions.title: System Configuration
permissions.camera_sub: Required for scanning visual hazard markers and streaming situational evidence.
permissions.mic_sub: Essential for voice-to-text distress logs and encrypted comms relay.
permissions.location_sub: Critical for high-accuracy tactical positioning and responder dispatch.
